Klasse PluginMetaDataValidator

java.lang.Object
org.quurz.plugins.data.PluginMetaDataValidator
public class PluginMetaDataValidator extends Object

Validates plugin metadata JSON strings against the defined JSON schema.

The class provides static methods to load and validate metadata from various sources.

Seit:
1.0.0

  • Methodenübersicht

    Modifikator und Typ

    loadAndValidatePluginMetadata(@NonNull InputStream inputStream)

    loadAndValidatePluginMetadata(@NonNull String fileName)
    static org.quurz.foomp.base.util.Result<org.quurz.foomp.base.util.Either<List<com.networknt.schema.Error>, PluginMetaData>>

  • Konstruktordetails

    • PluginMetaDataValidator

      public PluginMetaDataValidator()

  • Methodendetails

    • loadAndValidatePluginMetadata

      public static org.quurz.foomp.base.util.Result<org.quurz.foomp.base.util.Either<List<com.networknt.schema.Error>, PluginMetaData>> loadAndValidatePluginMetadata(@NonNull String fileName)

      Loads and validates plugin metadata from a file via its filename.

      Parameter:
      fileName - the name of the file to load; must not be null
      Gibt zurück:
      a Result containing either an Either with a list of Errors (in case of validation errors) or the validated PluginMetaData object
      Löst aus:
      IOException - if an I/O error occurs
      NullPointerException - if fileName is null
      Seit:
      1.0.0

    • loadAndValidatePluginMetadata

      public static org.quurz.foomp.base.util.Result<org.quurz.foomp.base.util.Either<List<com.networknt.schema.Error>, PluginMetaData>> loadAndValidatePluginMetadata(@NonNull Path fileName)

      Loads and validates plugin metadata from a file via its path.

      Parameter:
      fileName - the Path to the file to load; must not be null
      Gibt zurück:
      a Result containing either an Either with a list of Errors (in case of validation errors) or the validated PluginMetaData object
      Löst aus:
      IOException - if an I/O error occurs
      NullPointerException - if fileName is null
      Seit:
      1.0.0

    • loadAndValidatePluginMetadata

      public static org.quurz.foomp.base.util.Result<org.quurz.foomp.base.util.Either<List<com.networknt.schema.Error>, PluginMetaData>> loadAndValidatePluginMetadata(@NonNull InputStream inputStream)

      Loads and validates plugin metadata from an InputStream.

      Parameter:
      inputStream - the InputStream containing the JSON; must not be null
      Gibt zurück:
      a Result containing either an Either with a list of Errors (in case of validation errors) or the validated PluginMetaData object
      Löst aus:
      NullPointerException - if inputStream is null
      Seit:
      1.0.0
